name: (1R, 2S)-cis 1,2 dihydroxy-1,2-dihydronaphthalene
description: (1R, 2S)-cis 1,2 dihydroxy-1,2-dihydronaphthalene is a solid. This compound belongs to the naphthalenes. These are compounds containing a naphthalene moiety, which consists of two fused benzene rings. Known drug targets of (1R, 2S)-cis 1,2 dihydroxy-1,2-dihydronaphthalene include naphthalene 1,2-dioxygenase subunit beta and naphthalene 1,2-dioxygenase subunit alpha.
